## Root cause

Describe the behavior difference and cite the legacy source.

## Behavior preserved

List the business rules that remain unchanged.

## Verification evidence

- [ ] A new or updated test failed before the implementation change.
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes.
- [ ] `npm run demo:incident` passes.
- [ ] The legacy source remains unchanged.

## Residual risk or unknowns

Name anything the reviewer should verify.

## Human decision

State whether this draft is ready for human review. Do not merge automatically.
